title: makedumpfile bug fix and enhancement update
overview: An update for Oracle Linux is now available for Oracle Linux 10.
description:
[1.7.7-2.0.1]
- Rebase makedumpfile to v1.7.7 [Orabug: 37932707]
- Rebase makedumpfile to v1.7.6 [Orabug: 37396521]
- Mark mem-usage not supported for arm64 architecure [Orabug: 30352094]

[1.7.7-2]
- Fix a data race in multi-threading mode (--num-threads=N)
full_text:
[1.7.7-2.0.1]
- Rebase makedumpfile to v1.7.7 [Orabug: 37932707]
- Rebase makedumpfile to v1.7.6 [Orabug: 37396521]
- Mark mem-usage not supported for arm64 architecure [Orabug: 30352094]

[1.7.7-2]
- Fix a data race in multi-threading mode (--num-threads=N)

References:
https://linux.oracle.com/errata/ELBA-2025-20122-0.html
